title: JDBC driver incorrectly converts TINYINT fields to String instead of an integer type.
key_bug_features: JDBC driver converts TINYINT to String instead of integer
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id TINYINT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (2, 'Bob', NULL);
SELECT id, name, age FROM test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
